animated-pictogram-video.props: {"type": "git-sync-home", "headline": "Realtime Collaboration", "subhead": "Instant updates across agents and humans"}

cue.label: Hook
cue.voice: Realtime Collaboration keeps humans and agents in sync while Git remains the source of truth.

subtitle.props: {"text":"Gossip + overlay cache, with Git as SSOT","x":960,"y":200}

cue.label: Gossip
cue.voice: Every change still writes issue JSON and an event log entry. Gossip publishes a small notification so other tools react immediately.

cue.label: Overlay
cue.voice: Watchers write a disposable overlay snapshot, so you can see updates before a pull lands. Overlay never resolves conflicts.

cue.label: Transports
cue.voice: Use a local Unix socket broker on one machine, or MQTT for LAN and cloud. Mosquitto can autostart locally when available.

cue.label: Close
cue.voice: Best-effort realtime, Git-authoritative history. Start a broker, run watch, and keep moving.
